title: Splash
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Attacks from another character to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
upgraded_description: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] Attacks from another character to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
notes: When upgraded, the selected Attack is automatically upgraded before being added to your hand.
